name: DebridHub
description: Replaces the *arr stack: direct streaming via self-refreshing .strm files, batch downloads, Torznab search, a watchlist, a Seerr/Jellyseerr request webhook, and a library organizer.
overview: Stream and batch-download from Real-Debrid / AllDebrid inside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog: The DebridHub dashboard now has its own entry in the Jellyfin admin menu, instead of being buried under Plugins - DebridHub - Open Dashboard.
